- Complete the Schengen visa application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/9eb6e47a6c87e73d00219d6355f2d7c7/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf), print it out and take it to your appointment.
- The portal will guide through the application questions and will make sure you
                                      do not forget to enter any necessary values.

Please Note:

- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you wish to visit Malta for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior
                                    to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Malta. This
                                    visa is issued if you are visiting family or friends in Malta.
The Schengen calculator (https://ec.europa.eu/home-affairs/content/visa-calculator_en) can be used for
                                    calculating the travel days remaining under a Schengen short-stay visa according to
                                    the 90-days/180-days rule. You can apply from six months before the intended date of
                                    travel.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you wish to visit Malta for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior
                                    to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Malta. This
                                    visa is issued if you are visiting family or friends in Malta.
The Schengen calculator (https://ec.europa.eu/home-affairs/content/visa-calculator_en) can be used for
                                    calculating the travel days remaining under a Schengen short-stay visa according to
                                    the 90-days/180-days rule. You can apply from six months before the intended date of
                                    travel.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Visiting family and friends in Malta
                                  ]
Methods of payment for visa fees:
- If the applicant submits their visa application at the Malta Visa Application
                                        Centre:
- Cash payment at the Malta Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment

[Table:   Visiting family and friends in Malta
                                  ]
Please Note:
- Special note for all applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre:
- The applicable visa fees in GHS depend on the current exchange rate, which can
                                        be changed without any notifications
- The visa fees need to be paid in cash at the Visa Application Centre
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service
                                        fee
- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable

## Documents Required
Get the peace of mind you need on your travels, with insurance made simple for more click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/mlt/travel-insurance-non-schengen).
Please see the checklist for a Visiting Family and Friends visa with the complete list of requirements.. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tqbfpN2Qj1sEqsEkwAvp4/9df4dad120debb4ec1503cf62b875d26/visiting-family-friends-visa.pdf)
- Complete the Schengen visa application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/9eb6e47a6c87e73d00219d6355f2d7c7/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf), print it out and take it to your appointment.
- The portal will guide through the application questions and will make sure you
                                      do not forget to enter any necessary values.

## Photo Specifications
General
- The photograph for each visa applicant must be an un-mounted, full face photo,
                                      colour photo as described below
- The photograph must have been taken within the last six months.
- Two photographs must be submitted.
Photo Size
- The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- 35 mm x 45 mm with the head centered in the frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the chin) should
                                      measure about 30 mm
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front view in which the visa applicant is
                                      facing the camera directly. .
- The face should cover about 70-80 percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in colour and have only a white or light background.
                                      Photos with dark, busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be accepted.
- In general, the applicant's head, including both face and hair, should be shown
                                      from the crown of the head to the tip of the chin on top and bottom and from
                                      hairline side-to-side. It is preferable that ears be exposed
- Sunglasses or other wear, which detracts from the face, are not acceptable
                                      unless required for medical reasons (an eye patch, for example).
- A photograph depicting a person wearing a traditional facemask or veil that does
                                      not permit adequate identification is not acceptable.
- Note :Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs
                                      presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered
                                      incomplete.

## Processing Time
For Schengen processing time will be a minimum of 15 working days. However, for
                                    certain cases, the Consular Services may decide to extend the processing time

## Download Forms
- This page hosts the form required for your Visa Application. Please click on the relevant form to download your visa application form.
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/598a2e4cdc608f9de835e86fc537a92c/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf)
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The purpose of the travel is to attend courses, internships, participation in
                                    Study/Exchange programs/Summer schools.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is required if during any portion of your visit you intend to
                                    conduct business or commercial activities, e.g. meetings, conferences, training,
                                    trade fairs.
visa_types.full_text:

[Table:   Seamen]
Please Note:
- Special note for all applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre:
- The applicable visa fees in GHS depend on the current exchange rate, which can
                                        be changed without any notifications
- The visa fees need to be paid in cash at the Visa Application Centre
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service
                                        fee
- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable
visa_types.processing_time:
For Schengen processing time will be a minimum of 15 working days. However, for
                                    certain cases, the Consular Services may decide to extend the processing time

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel,
                                    and seeking to enter Malta solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with
                                    the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is
                                    bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Malta to join a vessel in
                                    this country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel,
                                    and seeking to enter Malta solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with
                                    the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is
                                    bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Malta to join a vessel in
                                    this country.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Seamen]
Methods of payment for visa fees:
- If the applicant submits their visa application at the Malta Visa Application
                                        Centre:
- Cash payment at the Malta Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment

[Table:   Seamen]
Please Note:
- Special note for all applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre:
- The applicable visa fees in GHS depend on the current exchange rate, which can
                                        be changed without any notifications
- The visa fees need to be paid in cash at the Visa Application Centre
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service
                                        fee
- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable

## Documents Required
Get the peace of mind you need on your travels, with insurance made simple for more click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/mlt/travel-insurance-non-schengen).
Please see the checklist for Seamen visa with the complete list of requirements. Click her for Checklist (#)
- Complete the Schengen visa application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/9eb6e47a6c87e73d00219d6355f2d7c7/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf), print it out and take it to your appointment.
- The portal will guide through the application questions and will make sure you
                                      do not forget to enter any necessary values.

## Photo Specifications
General
- The photograph for each visa applicant must be an un-mounted, full face photo,
                                      colour photo as described below
- The photograph must have been taken within the last six months.
- Two photographs must be submitted.
Photo Size
- The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure:
- 35 mm x 45 mm with the head centered in the frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair to the bottom of the chin) should
                                      measure about 30 mm
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front view in which the visa applicant is
                                      facing the camera directly. .
- The face should cover about 70-80 percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in colour and have only a white or light background.
                                      Photos with dark, busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be accepted.
- In general, the applicant's head, including both face and hair, should be shown
                                      from the crown of the head to the tip of the chin on top and bottom and from
                                      hairline side-to-side. It is preferable that ears be exposed
- Sunglasses or other wear, which detracts from the face, are not acceptable
                                      unless required for medical reasons (an eye patch, for example).
- A photograph depicting a person wearing a traditional facemask or veil that does
                                      not permit adequate identification is not acceptable.
- Note :Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs
                                      presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered
                                      incomplete.

## Processing Time
For Schengen processing time will be a minimum of 15 working days. However, for
                                    certain cases, the Consular Services may decide to extend the processing time

## Download Forms
- This page hosts the form required for your Visa Application. Please click on the relevant form to download your visa application form.
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/598a2e4cdc608f9de835e86fc537a92c/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf)
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing,
                                    cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of
                                    your visit to Malta you intend to engage in business, or official duties you must
                                    refer to other relevant visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing,
                                    cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of
                                    your visit to Malta you intend to engage in business, or official duties you must
                                    refer to other relevant visa categories.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Tourist Visa]
Methods of payment for visa fees:

                                        Centre:

- Sunglasses or other wear, which detracts from the face, are not acceptable

- A photograph depicting a person wearing a traditional facemask or veil that does

visa_types.name: Short stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
If you wish to visit Malta for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to
                              entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Malta.
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Malta territory and all
                              other Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of
                              six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area. Nationals from countries
                              included in the list of countries with the obligation to carry a visa
                                in order to cross external borders must be in possession of this visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7dinDgs13HIQ8XIgVAoLdq/a1c89085f5ed3026e8849174ac391538/ListadopasessometidosvisadoEN.pdf). Please click
                              the appropriate visa category for more information.
visa_types.full_text:
If you wish to visit Malta for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to
                              entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Malta.
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Malta territory and all
                              other Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of
                              six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area. Nationals from countries
                              included in the list of countries with the obligation to carry a visa
                                in order to cross external borders must be in possession of this visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7dinDgs13HIQ8XIgVAoLdq/a1c89085f5ed3026e8849174ac391538/ListadopasessometidosvisadoEN.pdf). Please click
                              the appropriate visa category for more information.
